current_product.title: Current Product
current_product.description: Informational only — not injected into generation prompt. Use offer_lock as the single pitch anchor.

prospect_first_name.title: Prospect First Name
prospect_first_name.description: First name used for greeting. Derived server-side from prospect.name if omitted.

offer_lock.title: Offer Lock
offer_lock.description: Single source of truth for what is pitched. All generation (real and mock) uses this exclusively.

offer_lock.title: Offer Lock
offer_lock.description: Single product/offering to pitch. Must match product_context.product_name.

cta_lock.title: Cta Lock
cta_lock.description: Exact CTA text used once at the end of every preview email body.
